sentences.target: Ich schreibe eine Postkarte aus Italien.

translations.de: Ich schreibe eine Postkarte aus Italien.
translations.en: I’m writing a postcard from Italy.
translations.es: Estoy escribiendo una postal desde Italia.
translations.fr: J’écris une carte postale depuis l’Italie.
translations.yue: 我喺意大利寫張明信片。
translations.pt: Estou escrevendo um cartão-postal da Itália.
translations.vi: Tôi đang viết một bưu thiếp từ Ý.
translations.ar: أنا أكتب بطاقة بريدية من إيطاليا.
translations.nl: Ik schrijf een ansichtkaart uit Italië.
translations.hi: मैं इटली से एक पोस्टकार्ड लिख रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Γράφω μια κάρτ ποστάλ από την Ιταλία.
translations.nb: Jeg skriver et postkort fra Italia.
translations.id: Saya sedang menulis kartu pos dari Italia.
translations.sv: Jag skriver ett vykort från Italien.
translations.ro: Scriu o carte poștală din Italia.
translations.da: Jeg skriver et postkort fra Italien.
translations.ja: イタリアから絵はがきを書いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present); predicates the action.
Indefinite article; determiner for the direct object (feminine, accusative).
Common noun; direct object of the verb (accusative).
Preposition introducing a source/origin PP; governs dative.
Proper noun; object of the preposition 'aus' (dative); indicates origin.

sentences.target: Du kannst die Postkarte heute noch einwerfen.
sentences.reading: /du kanst diː ˈpɔstˌkaʁtə ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɔx ˈaɪ̯nˌvɛʁfən/

translations.de: Du kannst die Postkarte heute noch einwerfen.
translations.ipa: /du kanst diː ˈpɔstˌkaʁtə ˈhɔʏ̯tə nɔx ˈaɪ̯nˌvɛʁfən/
translations.en: You can mail the postcard today.
translations.es: Puedes enviar la postal hoy mismo.
translations.fr: Tu peux poster la carte postale aujourd’hui.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天就能把明信片寄出去。
translations.yue: 你今日就可以寄出張明信片。
translations.ru: Ты можешь отправить открытку уже сегодня.
translations.pt: Você pode enviar o cartão-postal ainda hoje.
translations.he: אתה יכול לשלוח את הגלויה כבר היום.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể gửi bưu thiếp ngay hôm nay.
translations.nl: Je kunt de ansichtkaart vandaag nog posten.
translations.uk: Ти можеш надіслати листівку вже сьогодні.
translations.hi: तुम आज ही पोस्टकार्ड भेज सकते हो।
translations.el: Μπορείς να στείλεις την κάρτ ποστάλ ακόμα και σήμερα.
translations.nb: Du kan sende postkortet allerede i dag.
translations.id: Kamu bisa mengirim kartu pos hari ini.
translations.sv: Du kan posta vykortet redan i dag.
translations.ro: Poți trimite cartea poștală chiar astăzi.
translations.da: Du kan sende postkortet allerede i dag.
translations.ja: 今日中にその絵はがきを出せるよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun in nominative; subject (2nd person singular).
Modal auxiliary (2nd person singular, present); takes an infinitive complement.
Definite article; determiner for the direct object (feminine, accusative).
Common noun; direct object of the verb phrase (accusative).
Temporal adverb; modifies the time of the action.
Adverb; adds the meaning 'still/yet' (often with 'heute' as 'heute noch').
Infinitive main verb with separable prefix 'ein-'; complement to the modal 'kannst'.

sentences.target: Oma liest die Postkarte am Küchentisch.

translations.de: Oma liest die Postkarte am Küchentisch.
translations.en: Grandma reads the postcard at the kitchen table.
translations.es: La abuela lee la postal en la mesa de la cocina.
translations.fr: Mamie lit la carte postale à la table de la cuisine.
translations.it: La nonna legge la cartolina al tavolo della cucina.
translations.zh-Hans: 奶奶在厨房的餐桌旁看明信片。
translations.yue: 阿嫲喺廚房張枱度睇明信片。
translations.ru: Бабушка читает открытку за кухонным столом.
translations.pt: A avó lê o cartão-postal na mesa da cozinha.
translations.he: סבתא קוראת את הגלויה ליד שולחן המטבח.
translations.vi: Bà đọc bưu thiếp ở bàn trong bếp.
translations.ar: الجدة تقرأ البطاقة البريدية على طاولة المطبخ.
translations.nl: Oma leest de ansichtkaart aan de keukentafel.
translations.uk: Бабуся читає листівку за кухонним столом.
translations.hu: Nagymama a konyhaasztalnál olvassa a képeslapot.
translations.hi: दादी रसोई की मेज पर पोस्टकार्ड पढ़ रही हैं।
translations.pl: Babcia czyta pocztówkę przy kuchennym stole.
translations.el: Η γιαγιά διαβάζει την κάρτ ποστάλ στο τραπέζι της κουζίνας.
translations.id: Nenek membaca kartu pos di meja dapur.
translations.ro: Bunica citește cartea poștală la masa din bucătărie.
translations.cs: Babička čte pohlednici u kuchyňského stolu.
translations.fi: Mummo lukee postikorttia keittiön pöydän ääressä.
translations.ja: おばあちゃんが台所のテーブルで絵はがきを読んでいる。

tokens.explanation: Common noun; subject of the sentence (nominative).
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); predicates the action.
Definite article; determiner for the direct object (feminine, accusative).
Common noun; direct object of 'liest' (accusative).
Contracted preposition ('an dem') introducing a locative PP; governs dative.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'am' (dative); indicates location.

sentences.target: Im Laden kaufe ich eine Postkarte.

translations.de: Im Laden kaufe ich eine Postkarte.
translations.en: In the shop, I buy a postcard.
translations.es: En la tienda compro una postal.
translations.fr: Au magasin, j’achète une carte postale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在商店里买一张明信片。
translations.pt: Na loja, eu compro um cartão-postal.
translations.vi: Trong cửa hàng, tôi mua một bưu thiếp.
translations.nl: In de winkel koop ik een ansichtkaart.
translations.hi: दुकान में मैं एक पोस्टकार्ड खरीदता हूँ।
translations.el: Στο μαγαζί αγοράζω μια κάρτ ποστάλ.
translations.nb: I butikken kjøper jeg et postkort.
translations.id: Di toko, saya membeli sebuah kartu pos.
translations.sv: I affären köper jag ett vykort.
translations.ro: În magazin, cumpăr o carte poștală.
translations.da: I butikken køber jeg et postkort.
translations.ja: 店で絵はがきを買います。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition ('in dem') introducing a locative PP; governs dative.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'im' (dative); setting/location.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, present) in V2 position.
Personal pronoun in nominative; subject following the verb due to V2 word order.
Indefinite article; determiner for the direct object (feminine, accusative).
Common noun; direct object of 'kaufe' (accusative).

Du kannst die Postkarte heute noch einwerfen.
Oma liest die Postkarte am Küchentisch.
Im Laden kaufe ich eine Postkarte.

You can mail the postcard today.
Grandma reads the postcard at the kitchen table.
In the shop, I buy a postcard.
